types.minimalInterface: provider config entry plus text/vision model selection
types.timeoutPolicy: provider SDK request timeout; never an unbounded retry loop
types.retryPolicy: only transient provider failures use the bounded Eve retry contract
types.healthCheck: configuration presence plus one disposable-replica model turn
types.idempotencyPolicy: a failed request must not repeat host side effects

types.minimalInterface: default defineTool export with description, zod inputSchema and bounded execute
types.timeoutPolicy: every network/process call has an explicit finite timeout
types.retryPolicy: no retry for non-idempotent writes; explicit bounded retry for safe reads
types.sideEffectPolicy: declare reads/writes and keep them inside the owning data module
types.idempotencyPolicy: write actions require a durable identity or must not retry

types.minimalInterface: Markdown with description frontmatter written as a trigger condition
types.timeoutPolicy: inherits the bounded tools it invokes
types.retryPolicy: must not invent retries around side-effecting tools
types.sideEffectPolicy: procedure only; side effects belong to declared tools
types.idempotencyPolicy: repeat invocation must respect tool idempotency

types.minimalInterface: default Eve channel/connection export with runtime-only auth
types.timeoutPolicy: connection calls use a finite transport timeout
types.retryPolicy: bounded reconnect for reads; writes need remote idempotency
types.healthCheck: missing-config/dependency gate then isolated connectivity probe
types.sideEffectPolicy: allowlist tools and require approval for sensitive remote writes
types.idempotencyPolicy: remote writes follow the server idempotency contract

types.minimalInterface: default defineHook export with explicit event handlers
types.timeoutPolicy: handler remains short and never waits on an unbounded external call
types.retryPolicy: event handlers do not retry non-idempotent writes
types.sideEffectPolicy: bounded append or deterministic projection only
types.idempotencyPolicy: use event identity when duplicate delivery is possible

types.minimalInterface: defineAgent description, model, bounded context and structured outputSchema
types.timeoutPolicy: delegation stays within the parent Workflow deadline
types.retryPolicy: model retries are bounded and cannot repeat parent tool side effects
types.sideEffectPolicy: task-mode output only unless tools are explicitly granted
types.idempotencyPolicy: return a validated value; parent owns mutations

types.minimalInterface: short-lived idempotent script owned by a systemd oneshot service/timer
types.timeoutPolicy: systemd RuntimeMaxSec plus finite child/network timeouts
types.retryPolicy: Persistent timer retries only the next scheduled idempotent run
types.healthCheck: systemd Result/ExecMainStatus and an explicit status artifact
types.sideEffectPolicy: atomic bounded state; never detached from an agent turn
types.idempotencyPolicy: same scheduled period can run twice without duplicate external effects

backgroundOwnership.uninstall: iva uninstall removes every managed iva-* unit

types.minimalInterface: deterministic vault transform or rebuildable sidecar index
types.timeoutPolicy: owned timer and every provider/process call are bounded
types.retryPolicy: derived indexes rebuild; source-vault writes use atomic/idempotent transforms
types.healthCheck: synthetic vault fixture plus memory recall canary
types.sideEffectPolicy: never rewrite source memory from an indexer; derived output is disposable
types.idempotencyPolicy: same vault input produces the same derived output

backgroundOwnership.uninstall: iva uninstall removes every managed iva-* unit
